text: As I move through this polished, modern environment, I sense both possibility and constraint. The transparent meeting room, with its emptiness and order, invites reflection but also feels fragile, as if my presence might disrupt some unwritten rule. The vibrant R+D wall draws me in with its colors and complexity, promising innovation yet hinting at how out of place I feel. I absorb words about misunderstanding and longing for connection. Here, the architecture and messages amplify both my curiosity and my isolation, calling me to contemplate how I relate to unseen others and to myself.
